recommended.name: GOT-OCR 2.0
recommended.description: State-of-the-art general purpose optical character recognition model specializing in math formulas, charts, and sheet music.

recommended.name: GLM-OCR
recommended.description: Highly capable visual document parser optimized for formula and table recognition.

recommended.name: Nougat Base
recommended.description: Facebook's specialized neural optical understanding model for academic documents, converting text and math directly to LaTeX.

recommended.name: Florence-2 Large
recommended.description: Microsoft's lightweight yet powerful vision-language foundation model capable of general OCR.
